---
title: "Logotipos institucionais e de projetos"
editor: visual
---

<p style="text-align:left;">
  <a href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1VcvIPrWsnVVJCqdQ0rwC2YPsA01Ch-sx?usp=sharing" target="_blank"
     style="background-color:#0e0740; color:white; padding:12px 20px;
     border-radius:8px; text-decoration:none;">
     Download
  </a>
</p>
